history.text: Magan Civilization appears in Oman's historical record.
Azd tribe migration appears in Oman's historical record.
Imamate was established, giving Oman a new political framework.
Nabhani dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Portuguese rule placed the territory under outside administration.

worthSeeing.title: Mutrah Souq:
worthSeeing.text: One of the oldest souqs in the Arab world, in a beautiful Muscat harbour setting.

worthSeeing.title: Wahiba Sands:
worthSeeing.text: Dramatic orange desert of dunes stretching to the Arabian Sea.

worthSeeing.title: Wadi Shab:
worthSeeing.text: Turquoise pools and waterfalls in a dramatic limestone gorge accessible by boat.

planningQuestions.a: Mutrah Souq, Wahiba Sands, Wadi Shab.
